# Skill: soprasteria-dep

## Goal

Provide DevSecOps Engineering Platform (DEP) skills covering CI/CD pipeline generation, modern workstation setup, infrastructure-as-code provisioning, and environment & pipeline provisioning using Sopra Steria's DEP CI Library and Project Booster platform.

## Sub-skills

| ID | File | Purpose |
|----|------|---------|
| DEP-1.1 | `sk-dep1.1-gitlab-ci-setup.md` | Analyse stack and generate `.gitlab-ci.yml` using DEP CI Library |
| DEP-2.1 | `sk-dep2.1-modern-workstation.md` | Configure modern developer workstation |
| DEP-3.1 | `sk-dep3.1-launchpad-iac.md` | Provision infrastructure via Launchpad IaC |
| DEP-4.1 | `sk-dep4.1-project-booster.md` | Provision environments, databases & CI/CD pipelines via Project Booster |

## When to use

- During project scaffolding to set up CI/CD pipelines
- When onboarding developers to establish workstation standards
- When provisioning cloud infrastructure via IaC templates
- When creating InnerShift/Arcus environments, databases, and application scaffolding via Project Booster
